name: forgeward-gate
description: Single-plugin marketplace for forgeward gate — an enforced, read-only review gate that blocks the push until gstack's missing conformance reviewers pass.

plugins.name: forgeward
plugins.description: Enforced, read-only conformance gate for gstack. Adds the reviewers gstack lacks (privacy, accessibility, ai-output, seo, supply-chain, security) and blocks /ship until every fired reviewer returns VERDICT: PASS.
